svg.text: Five rule families, twenty-nine checks, one verdict.
Fixed-format artifacts a construction ERP emits,
generated as a seeded fictional corpus.
Documents are classified and read in place —
never edited, never re-saved, never guessed at.
carries the control rationale, not just a verdict.
Did the post actually happen, and did it balance?
Is this payment allowed to be released yet?
A valid approver chain, with duties segregated?
Will year-end reporting be complete and correct?
Does the schedule of values mirror the contract?
Each check yields a finding — rule, status,
location, and why the control exists.
Precedence FAIL over FLAG over PASS collapses
the findings into one answer and one exit code.
A reviewer reads the exception package and
decides. Nothing moves without that decision.
The engine never posts, never pays, and never writes
to a source artifact. It is a sensor, not an actor.
